pi_items.source: Task description exact match and export_result.sh explicit file path parsing
Task description exact match and export_result.sh parsing of torrc/prefs.js
Task description exact match and export_result.sh parsing of moz_places and moz_bookmarks

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a live Tor Browser to configure bridges and bookmark real Tor Project documentation URLs. The target file path is explicitly required to be '/home/ga/Documents/bridge-workshop-guide.md'. The agent must configure Tor Browser to use the built-in 'obfs4' bridge and successfully bookmark 'tb-manual.torproject.org/bridges' and 'support.torproject.org/censorship' with their respective exact titles ('Tor Bridge Guide - Workshop' and 'Censorship Circumvention Support'). All claimed metadata values match the specific string matches in the export_result.sh verifier script.
